title: SEC0: online_users() and pub_id() not exposed in NieClient wasm_bindgen API
description: File: wasm/src/api.rs (NieClient impl block) vs wasm/src/client.rs lines 316-323. NieRelayClient::online_users() and NieRelayClient::pub_id() are implemented but not forwarded through NieClient to JavaScript. This means: (1) JS code cannot retrieve the authenticated pub_id after connect() resolves (the Promise returns it once, but there is no getter for later queries). (2) JS code cannot query the online user list — critical for implementing the MLS admin election invariant documented in CLAUDE.md, which requires JS to read online_users()[0] to determine the group admin. Without these methods, the WASM API is incomplete and any JS MLS implementation would be impossible without re-implementing the online list tracking in JS.
